title: stipa zalesskyi subsp. glabrata
intro: Stipa zalesskyi subsp. glabrata, also known as Zalessky's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Stipa zalesskyi subsp. glabrata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. Stipa zalesskyi subsp. glabrata is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
